claims.summary: Dynamic-noise and viscous-rho source-prepared functions have continuous bounded tests and are explicitly not wired into ESN::step.
AdaptivePressureNoiseTrialReviewV1 keeps live_control_required true and runnable_without_approval false for live ESN integration.
Wiring source-prepared noise, pressure, or rho policy into ESN::step requires operator approval and replay/canary evidence.
